name: Phox Forage
author: Poki
description: Phox Forage is a crafting game where you guide an adorable fox through a rich and resource-filled forest! Begin by gathering blueberries and continue your journey to collect all kinds of valuable resources scattered throughout the environment. As you explore, learn recipes to craft new materials and tools that will help you expand your abilities. Trade with other cute animals in the forest. Build an oven to cook delicious food and plant your own crops to develop your business. Can you turn your forage into a successful enterprise in this magical forest? How to play Phox Forage? Click move and gather resources. Who created Phox Forage? Phox Forage is created by PlayCap. Play their other games on Poki: Growmi and Snake Solver ! How can I play Phox Forage for free? You can play Phox Forage for free on Poki. Can I play Phox Forage on mobile devices and desktop? Phox Forage can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
